entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00043) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICING CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 1/23/2017 TO 9/30/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE INVOICING INSTRUCTIONS UNDER CONTRACT SECTION B.11. ACCORDINGLY, CONTRACT CLAUSE FSA 32-2 INVOICE AND CONTRACT FINANCING REQUESTS SUBMISSION - INVOICE PROCESSING PLATFORM (AUG 2017), PREVIOUSLY ADDED VIA MODIFICATION 00039, IS HEREBY REPLACED BY FSA 32-3 INVOICE AND CONTRACT FINANCING REQUESTS SUBMISSION - INVOICE PROCESSING PLATFORM (DEC 2017).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA12D0005 (P00045) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION SERVICING CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 9/27/2016 TO 9/30/2019.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER'S REPRESENTATIVE (COR) FROM LENNY BROWN TO LYNN SMITH.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::CT::IGF::CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029) FOR THE PERIOD OF 9/27/2016 TO 9/30/2019. MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DO THE FOLLOWING:
1. INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-7 (REVISION 1), CONTRACTOR SECURITY RESPONSIBILITIES (AUG 2018)
2. INCORPORATE FSA LOCAL CLAUSE 39-8 (REVISION 1), SUPPLEMENTAL INSTRUCTIONS TO EDAR 3452.239-72, DEPARTMENT SECURITY REQUIREMENTS (AUG 2018)
